title: A pilot and two air controllers sighted a spheric UFO near Santarém [2008]
excerpt: OCT 17th, 2008. Time: 2:34 am. Duration: 60 seconds. Under good visibility conditions and a clear sky, two air traffic operators from the Control Tower of Santarém Airport (State of Pará) and another pilot of the GOL 1991 flight from Belém (Capital of Pará) to Santarém, spotted with the naked eye a spherical ball-sized red […]
text_preview: OCT 17th, 2008. Time: 2:34 am. Duration: 60 seconds. Under good visibility conditions and a clear sky, two air traffic operators from the Control Tower of Santarém Airport (State of Pará) and another pilot of the GOL 1991 flight from Belém (Capital of Pará) to Santarém, spotted with the naked eye a spherical ball-sized red unidentified flying object. According to the three witnesses’ reports, the UFO traveled at high speed, moving from Northwest to Northeast at an altitude not specified by observers. The ‘red to dark-red’ object had the appearance of a falling star according to the report. Fol
summary: On Oct 17, 2008 two air traffic controllers and a GOL airline pilot independently observed a red spherical UFO at high speed near Santarém Airport, PA.
